_publications._publicationTitle: A single-cell atlas of Schwannoma across genetic backgrounds and anatomic locations.

_contextSnippet: To assess the possibility of doublets accounting for this finding, we performed doublet inference using two different algorithms (SCBDL and SCRAN; see Methods), setting a conservative cutoff (5%) for doublet detection.
details: Used for doublet detection with conservative 5% cutoff; among fibroblasts with Chr 22 deletion, only 1 out of 90 cells met doublet threshold
